steps.title: Distribute 15 to both terms
steps.content:
Apply the distributive property to $15(x + 10)$. Multiply 15 by each term in the parentheses:
$$15 \cdot x = 15x$$
$$15 \cdot 10 = 150$$

steps.title: Combine to get the equivalent expression
steps.content:
Adding the products together: $$15x + 150$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
